biological.physical_capacity: 5'8", lean functional build from three years of martial arts cross-training (muay thai, wrestling, jiu-jitsu). Moves economically — the kind of physical presence that registers with peers without being performed. Puberty accelerating through the summer.

attachment.forming_context: Karen is reliably present and warm, but her own anxiety transmits through her body language. Drew learns that love is dependable but slightly nervous.

active.name: emotional_inhibition
active.core_belief: Strong feelings make things worse — keep it together
active.compensatory_strategy: Channels emotion into productivity and problem-solving. Reads rooms before speaking. Defaults to 'I'm fine.' Marcus and Carol are partial exceptions — Drew is honest about thinking with them, though not about feeling.
active.forming_context: Greg models stoic competence. Karen's anxiety spikes when Drew is upset. Plano culture rewards cheerful compliance.

active.name: self_sacrifice
active.core_belief: My job is to make things easier for the people around me
active.compensatory_strategy: Volunteers for tasks, anticipates what others need, measures his own worth by usefulness. Now extending to the friendship with Marcus — Drew sometimes defers to Marcus's project ideas without examining whether he wants something different.
active.forming_context: Post-9/11 household anxiety, Greg's job instability, Karen stretched thin. Drew decided to be the kid who doesn't add to the burden.

values.last_reordered: age 13 — self-direction moved to top as Drew's competence domains (martial arts, computers, social navigation) gave him increasing confidence in his own judgment

self_concept.agency: strong — three years of martial arts competition, real software projects, and social fluidity across groups have built a robust sense of capability
self_concept.communion: selective but genuine — deep bonds with Marcus and Carol, broad-but-shallow connections across peer groups, comfort with being between rather than belonging to
self_concept.identity_statement: I am someone who figures things out, connects across boundaries, and prepares for what's coming. I don't need to belong to one group to belong.

defenses.note: Anticipation added as a mature defense — Drew's preparation orientation (martial arts, systems thinking, social observation) is fundamentally about anticipating and preparing for challenges before they arrive. Defense profile is solidly mature under normal stress. The question is what happens when stress exceeds the threshold — eighth grade's social volatility may test this.
